tests.scenario: Visual verification of 'Premium' badges during content search
steps: Open the Calm application
Navigate to the search bar and enter a keyword for a known paid session
Observe the search results for the presence of a 'Premium' badge
Enter a keyword for a known free session and observe the results
tests.expected_result: All paid content items display a visible 'Premium' icon, while free items have no badge.
tests.notes: Revised to specifically test the visual badging requirement derived from Valerie's budget conscious persona.

tests.scenario: Verification of 48 hour trial expiration notification
steps: Enroll a test account in a 7 days free trial
Fast forward system time to the end of the 5th day (48 hours before expiration)
Check the device for a push notification
tests.expected_result: A push notification is triggered at the 5 day mark containing a direct link to the subscription cancellation page.
tests.notes: Updated steps to include the specific 48 hour timing and deeplink requirement for better testability.

tests.scenario: Functional test of Sleep Story narrator filtering
steps: Navigate to the Sleep Story library
Select the 'Narrator' filter option
Select a specific narrator name from the alphabetized list
Verify the resulting content list
tests.expected_result: The system displays only the stories narrated by the selected individual.
tests.notes: Converted from generic 'access session' test to a specific filter functionality test for Sleep Story narrators.

steps: Play 'Sleep Story A' and measure the peak volume level
Play 'Sleep Story B' (different narrator) and measure the peak volume level
Compare the peak decibel levels between the two tracks
tests.expected_result: The maximum peak of both stories is -12 dB, and the difference between them does not exceed 2 dB.
tests.notes: Newly created test for the normalization requirement to address Sam's pain point regarding sudden waking.

tests.scenario: Playback persistence during physical screen lock
steps: Start a guided meditation session
Press the device power button to lock the screen
Monitor audio output for 60 seconds
tests.expected_result: The audio continues playing without pausing, stuttering, or stopping when the screen is locked.
tests.notes: Refined the automated stability test to specifically target the lock-screen behavior requested by Ian.

tests.scenario: Verification of support ticket status dashboard
steps: Submit a technical support request via the app
Navigate to the 'Support' dashboard
Locate the 'My Tickets' section
Check for status and agent response timestamps
tests.expected_result: The dashboard displays the current status of the ticket and the timestamp of the last agent response.
tests.notes: Created to validate the new support transparency requirement for the Stability Prioritizing persona.

tests.scenario: Verification of Daily Calm content refresh cycle
steps: Log in at 11:55 PM and note the Daily Calm session title
Wait until 12:01 AM local time
Refresh the home screen and check the Daily Calm session
tests.expected_result: The Daily Calm features a new, unique title and audio track different from the previous day.
tests.notes: Revised to ensure the content refresh happens precisely at the scheduled time to support Rachel's routine.

tests.scenario: Home screen widget one-tap playback test
steps: Add a specific music track to the 'Morning Routine' widget
Navigate to the phone/app home screen
Tap the 'Morning Routine' widget once
tests.expected_result: The app opens and immediately begins playback of the selected track without requiring further clicks.
tests.notes: New test to validate the one tap access constraint for habit building routines.

tests.scenario: Availability and visibility of 'Skip' button during onboarding
steps: Initiate a new user onboarding flow
Navigate through the steps until a subscription/marketing offer is presented
Identify the 'Skip' or 'Not Now' button
Click the button
tests.expected_result: The 'Skip' button is clearly visible without scrolling and successfully bypasses the offer to the next screen.
tests.notes: Refined from vague onboarding tests to specifically address Alex's pain point regarding intrusive marketing.

tests.scenario: Measurement of subscription cancellation click path
steps: Open 'Account Settings'
Click 1: Select 'Manage Subscription'
Click 2: Select 'Cancel Subscription'
Observe the system response
tests.expected_result: The cancellation is initiated within two clicks, and a confirmation code is generated immediately.
tests.notes: Updated to strictly measure the 'two click' constraint required for the Navigation Stressed persona.
